'''Boordii''' was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Its central source of income came from [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] transporting contraband offworld.<ref name="TCSWE" /> After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] the whole sector including this planet, left the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

{{Planet-stub}}
